name: ESTABLISHMENT LABS HOLDINGS INC.
business: The company is a global medical technology company focused on breast aesthetics and reconstruction. It sells silicone gel-filled breast implants (Motiva Implants) and related products including tissue expanders and minimally invasive systems. Customers include medical device distributors and direct sales to physicians, hospitals, and clinics in over 100 countries.

exposures.sentence: We are a global medical technology company focused on improving patient safety and aesthetic outcomes, initially in the breast aesthetics and reconstruction market.

catalysts.event: Publication of 3-Year Results of Mia Femtech Clinical Study
catalysts.sentence: On October 14, 2025, we announced the publication of The 3-Year Results of a 100-Patient Prospective Study of Safety and Effectiveness of Mia Femtech in the Aesthetic Surgery Journal .

catalysts.event: Appointment of Peter Caldini as CEO
catalysts.sentence: On May 7, 2025, we announced the appointment of Peter Caldini as Chief Executive Officer following the retirement of Juan José Chacón-Quirós as CEO, effective March 1, 2025.
On March 6, 2025, we partnered with GRAMMY winner Meghan Trainor, generating over 9 billion media impressions and supporting our U.S. market launch.
In February 2025, we launched Preserv , a minimally invasive breast tissue-preserving technology for breast augmentation, revision augmentation and mastopexy augmentation.

catalysts.event: Full US launch of Preserv expected in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Launches in additional countries, including a full launch in the United States, are expected in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 1.7 million breast augmentations were performed worldwide in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 1.7 million breast augmentations were performed worldwide in 2024, according to the International Society of Aesthetic Plastic Surgery, or ISAPS.

tamClaims.claim: The global breast reconstruction market valued at $2.16 billion in 2024, projected to exceed $3.15 billion by 2030 at a CAGR of 6.7%.
tamClaims.sentence: The market, valued at $2.16 billion in 2024, is projected to exceed $3.15 billion by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: 162,579 breast reconstruction surgeries were performed in the United States in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: The American Society of Plastic Surgeons noted in their Procedural Statistics Release that 162,579 breast reconstruction surgeries were performed in 2024 in the United States.
